title: Livestock, killing or injuring
doc_html:
SUBPART B.  INJURING OR KILLING LIVESTOCK

§501.  Livestock, killing or injuring

All railroad companies operating lines through this state, shall comply with the regulations provided in this Sub-part relative to the killing or injuring of livestock by their trains.
